Lift Station
Cleaning & Maintenance

Professional lift station pumping, cleaning, and maintenance for residential, commercial, and municipal systems across North Texas. Keep your station running — before it becomes an emergency.

📞 Call Now
What We Do

Reliable Lift Station
Service & Pumping

Lift stations are critical infrastructure — when they fail, the consequences are immediate and messy. Direct Pumping provides thorough cleaning, pumping, and routine maintenance to keep your station operating properly and your system protected.

  • 🚛
    Wet Well Pumping & Cleaning — Full pump-out and high-pressure cleaning of the wet well to remove accumulated solids, grease, and debris that reduce capacity and damage pumps.
  • 🔧
    Routine Maintenance Visits — Scheduled service to inspect floats, controls, and pumps — catching issues before they become failures.
  • 🚨
    Emergency Response — Lift station alarm or overflow situation? We respond fast, 24/7, to minimize environmental impact and system damage.
  • 📋
    Service Documentation — Detailed service records provided after every visit — essential for regulatory compliance and system history.
⚠️

Don't wait for an alarm. Most lift station failures are preventable with routine cleaning and maintenance. A neglected wet well causes pump wear, overflows, and environmental violations — all of which cost far more than regular service.

Signs Your Lift Station
Needs Service

Don't ignore these warning signs — they only get worse.

⚡ Alarm light or alarm horn activating
👃 Strong sewage odors near the station
💧 Slow drainage in connected fixtures
🔁 Pumps cycling more frequently than normal
📅 No service in the past 12–18 months
🌊 Visible overflow or wet ground nearby

Not Sure? Call Us.

We'll talk through what you're seeing and let you know if it warrants a service visit. No pressure, straight answers.

Service Contracts

Set It & Forget It

The easiest way to protect your lift station is a scheduled maintenance contract. We handle the calendar, track your service history, and show up when we're supposed to — so you don't have to think about it.

📅

Scheduled Visits

Monthly, quarterly, or custom intervals based on your system's load and usage. We recommend frequency based on your specific setup.

📋

Full Service Records

Every visit is documented — service performed, observations, and recommendations. Your records are always available when you need them.

📞

Priority Response

Contract customers get priority scheduling for emergency calls. When an alarm goes off, you're at the top of the list.
